match.userMessage:
Handheld camera maintains a gentle eye-level hold with natural micro-movement as Scarlett pauses at the sand's edge. She rolls the coral lipstick tube slowly between her fingers in a moment of quiet consideration, her body still while her hands turn the tube once. A light sea breeze drifts through her hair and linen clothing. Distant waves lap softly along the shoreline under bright morning light.

gentle ocean waves lapping on shore with light breeze.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
